closed: topology trend PPS and thresholds are sourced from API and PostgreSQL fields
six operation forms submit real control-plane requests and persist queued records
probe read and write permissions plus tenant isolation are enforced
operation and audit writes now share one PostgreSQL transaction
fixture conflicts do not overwrite non-fixture probe rows
six queued audit actions are verified in the live database
topology excludes probe:metrics tokens and isolates tenant graph reads
near-colliding nodes retain at least seven normalized coordinate units after layout normalization
bidirectional links merge by maximum bandwidth and worst status
open: probe control-channel consumer and ACK callback are not implemented, so queued operations do not transition to completed

closed: default screenshot state is 3D and near 6 hours
2D and 3D use distinct API-coordinate SVG paths
topology includes online warning and offline representative nodes
status matrix uses 10 rows per page with a fixed pagination slot
main and right rail bottoms align without module coverage
trend series names are compacted to preserve legend room
both 2D and 3D evidence captures are fixed at 1920x1080
duplicate topology detail overlay was removed and status colors are consistent
open: the API SVG is a schematic topology and does not reproduce every decorative building and switch asset from the target raster pixel-for-pixel

adjudication.reason: dynamic topology data, 2D and 3D projections, status semantics, interactions, persistence, audit and visual containment are proven in Windows Chrome
adjudication.next_backend_scope: implement the probe command consumer, agent execution protocol, ACK callback and queued-to-completed or failed state machine
